items.snippet:

- Updated bundled Claude CLI to version 2.1.112
- Updated to parity with Claude Code v2.1.112
- Fixed "claude-opus-4-7 is temporarily unavailable" for auto mode

items.title: @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.112
items.snippet: Use Claude, Anthropic's AI assistant, right from your terminal. Claude can understand your codebase, edit files, run terminal commands, and handle entire workflows for you.

items.title: v2.1.111
items.snippet:
What's changed
- Claude Opus 4.7 xhigh is now available! Use /effort to tune speed vs. intelligence
- Auto mode is now available for Max subscribers when using Opus 4.7
- Added xhigh effort level for Opus 4.7, sitting between high and max. Available via /effort, --effort, and the model picker; other

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.7
items.snippet: Our latest Opus model brings stronger performance across coding, agents, vision, and multi-step tasks, with greater thoroughness and consistency on the work that matters most.

items.title: v1.0.77
items.snippet:
Subprocess environment scrubbing for untrusted-input workflows
Workflows that configure allowednonwriteusers now automatically get CLAUDECODESUBPROCESSENVSCRUB=1, which makes Claude Code (v2.1.79+) strip Anthropic and cloud provider credentials from the environment of subprocesses it spawns (Bash to
